episodes.title: Raw video: Ro Khanna on war in Iran, Epstein files, 2028 plans
episodes.description:
California Rep. Ro Khanna, a potential 2028 Democratic presidential candidate, is in New Hampshire for a number of events. In a one-on-one interview, he tells WMUR he and his new legislative partner Thomas Massie will be forcing a vote on a war powers resolution this week in the Congress. He also touches on the Epstein files and his potential political ambitions.

WMUR is your home for New Hampshire breaking news and weather. For your latest New Hampshire news and weather visit: https://www.wmur.com/

For licensing inquiries: https://www.wmur.com/licensing

episodes.title: Leader of Zizians arrested in Maryland; Group has been tied to death of Vermont Border Patrol agent
episodes.description:
They face multiple charges including trespassing, obstructing and hindering and possession of a handgun in the vehicle.
